query:
SELECT
                p.slug AS project_slug,
                i.provider,
                i.repository,
                i.ref_pattern,
                i.created_at
            FROM project_oidc_identities i
            JOIN projects p ON p.id = i.project_id
            WHERE i.provider = ? AND i.repository = ?
            ORDER BY p.slug ASC, i.ref_pattern ASC
